headline: 3 Reasons to Sell SYY and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Sysco currently trades at $72.71 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 3.7%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 7.1% gain during that period.
